info.name: GovCom Platform API
info.description:
Collection complète de l'API GovCom Platform — Golden Studio × Institutions

**Base URL:** http://localhost:3000/api/v1

**Comptes de test:**
- super_admin: admin@goldenstudio.com / Admin@1234
- admin: manager@goldenstudio.com / Manager@1234
- validator: validator@goldenstudio.com / Validator@1234
- contributor: creator@goldenstudio.com / Creator@1234
- client_admin MIPISE: admin@mipise.gov.dz / Client@1234
- client_validator MIPISE: validateur@mipise.gov.dz / Client@1234
- client_reader MIPISE: lecteur@mipise.gov.dz / Client@1234
- client_admin API-ZF: admin@api-zf.gov.dz / Client@1234
- client_contributor API-ZF: contributeur@api-zf.gov.dz / Client@1234

item.name: 01 — Auth
item.description: Authentification : login, refresh, logout, 2FA, change password, profil

item.name: 07 — Proposals
